name: The Necessity Retail REIT Inc. 7.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: The Necessity Retail REIT Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on retail properties. The company issues preferred stock, such as the 7.50% Series A, to raise capital for its operations and investments in real estate. The REIT is headquartered in New York.
